scripts.test:a11y: npm run build:a11y && PLAYWRIGHT_USE_STATIC_SERVER=true PLAYWRIGHT_A11Y_OFFLINE=true DISABLE_OG_IMAGES=true npx playwright test tests/accessibility.spec.js tests/navigation.spec.js tests/contrast.spec.js
scripts.test:a11y:list: PLAYWRIGHT_A11Y_OFFLINE=true DISABLE_OG_IMAGES=true npx playwright test tests/accessibility.spec.js tests/navigation.spec.js tests/contrast.spec.js --list
scripts.prebuild: node scripts/clean-output-dir.js && node scripts/sync-curated-stubs.js && node scripts/clean-og-images.js && (node scripts/fetch-thesis-keywords.js || true)
scripts.prebuild:local: CACHE_ONLY=true node scripts/clean-output-dir.js && CACHE_ONLY=true node scripts/sync-curated-stubs.js && node scripts/clean-og-images.js && CACHE_ONLY=true node scripts/fetch-thesis-keywords.js
scripts.build:local:full: npm run build:local && DISABLE_OG_IMAGES=true node scripts/run-pagefind.js && DISABLE_OG_IMAGES=true node scripts/build-seo-dashboard.js
scripts.prebuild:no-og: node scripts/clean-output-dir.js && node scripts/sync-curated-stubs.js && node scripts/clean-og-images.js && (node scripts/fetch-thesis-keywords.js || true)
scripts.postbuild:no-og: DISABLE_OG_IMAGES=true node scripts/run-pagefind.js && DISABLE_OG_IMAGES=true node scripts/build-seo-dashboard.js
scripts.prebuild:links: node scripts/clean-output-dir.js && node scripts/sync-curated-stubs.js && node scripts/clean-og-images.js && (node scripts/fetch-thesis-keywords.js || true)
scripts.deploy:codeberg: npm run build:no-og && touch _site/.nojekyll && echo 'codeberg.jarilaru.fi' > _site/.domains && rm -rf _site/.git && cd _site && git init -b main && git config user.name 'Jari Laru' && git config user.email 'jari.laru@gmail.com' && git add . && git commit -m "deploy: $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ) [ci skip]" && git push --force https://LaruX:${CODEBERG_TOKEN}@codeberg.org/LaruX/pages.git main:main
